---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea
title: '[feature] '
labels: enhancement
---

## The problem

What are you trying to figure out about your Claude usage that the dashboard doesn't currently answer? Or what about the existing flow feels off?

## Proposed solution

What would the dashboard show or do differently?

## Alternatives considered

Other shapes this could take. It's fine if there's only one.

## Scope check

This project deliberately stays small (single HTML + one Python script, no build, no server). If your idea is best served by a server or a heavier stack, [iftahs/claude-dashboard](https://github.com/iftahs/claude-dashboard) is the better fit and a great recommendation.
